verdict.summary: Guide has several material inaccuracies about ferry routes, ticket integration and Navegante pricing; it should not be published without corrections.

issues.problem: Montijo is incorrectly grouped with Terreiro do Paço/Barreiro and Soflusa. The regular Barreiro route uses Terreiro do Paço, but the Montijo river connection is not the Terreiro do Paço-Barreiro Soflusa route.
issues.suggestion: Split into separate routes: “Terreiro do Paço ↔ Barreiro” and “Cais do Sodré ↔ Montijo” if the Montijo service is being covered. Do not label Montijo as the Soflusa Terreiro do Paço route.
issues.source: Transtejo/Soflusa official routes map and timetables

issues.problem: The Trafaria/Porto Brandão ferry is from Belém, not Cais do Sodré. Cais do Sodré serves routes such as Cacilhas, Seixal and Montijo.
issues.suggestion: Replace with “Belém–Porto Brandão–Trafaria” and, separately if needed, “Cais do Sodré–Cacilhas/Seixal/Montijo”.
issues.source: Transtejo/Soflusa official routes map and timetables

issues.current: Cais do Sodré ↔ Porto Brandão (через Trafaria)
issues.problem: Wrong departure terminal. Porto Brandão/Trafaria service is the Belém route, not Cais do Sodré.
issues.suggestion: Change title to “Belém ↔ Porto Brandão ↔ Trafaria”.
issues.source: Transtejo/Soflusa official routes map and timetables

issues.current: ⏰ Билет ВРЕМЕННОЙ: 1 час с момента валидирования
issues.problem: Misleading for ferry tickets. A single ferry ticket is not a general 1-hour multimodal ticket like Carris/Metro; ferry occasional tickets are route-specific/validated for the river crossing. Time validity and transfer rules differ by product.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Разовый билет на паром валидируется для конкретной речной поездки/маршрута; это не универсальный 1-часовой билет на метро/автобус. Для пересадок используйте месячный Navegante или отдельные билеты/Zapping по правилам каждого оператора.”
issues.source: Transtejo/Soflusa tariff conditions; Metropolitano/Carris ticket conditions

issues.current: 🔁 За это время можно сделать пересадку метро/автобус (один тариф)
issues.problem: Incorrect. A Transtejo/Soflusa occasional ferry ticket does not normally include a free transfer to metro/bus on one fare. Integration applies mainly through Navegante monthly passes or specific multimodal products, not ordinary ferry singles.
issues.suggestion: Remove this line or replace with: “Разовый паромный билет не включает бесплатную пересадку на метро/автобус; пересадки покрывает месячный Navegante или оплачиваются отдельно.”
issues.source: Transtejo/Soflusa tariff conditions; Transportes Metropolitanos de Lisboa/Navegante tariff information

issues.current: 💰 30 €/мес — безлимит автобус, метро, поезд CP, паромы
issues.problem: Wrong price for Navegante Metropolitano. €30/month is the municipal pass price; the metropolitan pass covering the Lisbon metropolitan area including cross-river commuting is €40/month for the standard adult product.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Navegante Municipal — 30 €/мес в пределах одного муниципалитета; Navegante Metropolitano — 40 €/мес по AML, включая метро, Carris/Carris Metropolitana, CP suburban, Fertagus, Metro Sul do Tejo и Transtejo/Soflusa по правилам тарифа.”
issues.source: Transportes Metropolitanos de Lisboa / Navegante fare table

issues.problem: Same pricing error: the metropolitan pass is €40/month, not €30/month. €30 is municipal.
issues.suggestion: Change amountEUR to 40 and label clearly as “Navegante Metropolitano”. Optionally add a separate cost line for “Navegante Municipal — 30 €/мес”.
issues.source: Transportes Metropolitanos de Lisboa / Navegante fare table

issues.problem: Understates and confuses the product scope. Navegante Metropolitano covers the Lisbon Metropolitan Area, not merely “Lisboa-Margem Sul”. There is also a municipal €30 product with narrower validity.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Navegante Metropolitano действует по всей Área Metropolitana de Lisboa; Navegante Municipal действует только в выбранном муниципалитете.”

issues.current: 🛥️ **Yellow Boat** (Hop-on Hop-off) — туристические паромы Belém + Cacilhas + центр, ≈25 €/день
issues.problem: This mixes commercial tourist cruises with public ferries and may imply Yellow Boat is part of the Transtejo/Soflusa ferry network or Navegante. It is a private tourist product with separate ticketing and routes.
issues.suggestion: Clarify: “Это не городской паром и не входит в Navegante; это отдельный туристический оператор/круиз, цены и маршруты проверять у Yellow Bus/Yellow Boat.”
issues.source: Yellow Bus/Yellow Boat official ticketing; Transtejo/Soflusa ticketing

issues.current: 🚌 От Cacilhas автобус 124 → Costa da Caparica (пляж)
issues.problem: Line number appears outdated/misleading after Carris Metropolitana reorganisation. The old TST-style numbering is not the reliable current reference for Cacilhas–Costa da Caparica travel.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: “От Cacilhas до Costa da Caparica ходят автобусы Carris Metropolitana; номера и частоту проверяйте в приложении/планировщике Carris Metropolitana, т.к. линии менялись.” If giving a number, verify against the current Carris Metropolitana timetable on the publication date.

issues.problem: The “Navegante 0,90 €” wording is unclear and likely wrong: Navegante is a fare system/card/pass, not a generic reduced single fare for everyone. The “Tejo 24h 6 €” figure also does not match the commonly published Lisbon 24h multimodal ticket pricing with Transtejo, which is materially higher than €6.
issues.suggestion: Replace with official current fare names from the TTSL/Navegante tariff table. Avoid “Navegante 0,90 €” unless you identify the exact product and eligibility. For 24h tickets, specify the exact product, e.g. Carris/Metro only vs Carris/Metro/Transtejo, and use the current official price.
issues.source: Transtejo/Soflusa tariff table; Navegante fare table

issues.problem: Likely outdated/incorrect and not precisely named. A 24h ticket including Transtejo is not simply a €6 “Tejo tourist” ticket; Lisbon 24h tickets differ depending on whether they include only Carris/Metro or also Transtejo/CP.
issues.suggestion: Use the exact current official product name and price from the Navegante/Metropolitano/Carris tariff table, or remove this cost line if not verified.
issues.source: Navegante fare table; Metropolitano de Lisboa ticket prices

issues.problem: Misleading for AML-wide pass/ferry use. The relevant card/product is Navegante; Carris is only one operator and its app is not the general reference for all ferry/Navegante products.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Карта Navegante; пополнение — через официальные каналы Navegante/операторов/автоматы. Для планирования маршрутов используйте Navegante/Carris Metropolitana/операторские приложения.”

issues.current: 🚲 Велосипеды бесплатно на пароме — отличный план «Cacilhas + велосипед на Costa da Caparica»
issues.problem: Overbroad. Bikes may be allowed free but subject to capacity, designated spaces, crew instructions and route/vessel constraints. Presenting it as unconditional is misleading.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Велосипеды обычно можно провозить бесплатно, но при наличии места и по правилам экипажа/оператора; в часы пик могут быть ограничения.”

issues.current: ⛅ Зимой расписание сокращено, ночные паромы только с пятницы по воскресенье
issues.problem: Too general and likely inaccurate across all routes. Timetables vary by route, weekday/weekend/holiday and seasonal changes; “night ferries only Friday to Sunday” is not a universal rule.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Расписания сильно зависят от маршрута, дня недели и сезона; поздние рейсы есть не на всех линиях. Проверяйте PDF/поиск расписания на TTSL перед поездкой.”

issues.current: 🌊 Шторм >2 м: паромы могут отменить (редко, только Belém-Trafaria)
issues.problem: The “>2 m” threshold and “only Belém-Trafaria” claim need a source. Weather cancellations can depend on wind, river/sea conditions, vessel type and port authority/operator decisions, not a simple public 2 m rule.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: “При сильном ветре/шторме отдельные рейсы могут задерживать или отменять; чаще страдают более открытые участки. Проверяйте alerts/avisos на TTSL.”

issues.problem: Needs caveat. Pet transport rules depend on carrier, hygiene/safety conditions, assistance animals, and potentially ticketing/size rules. “Free” without conditions may mislead.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Маленьких животных обычно можно везти в переноске по правилам оператора; собаки-поводыри допускаются отдельно. Проверьте актуальные condições de transporte de animais у TTSL.”

issues.problem: Carris Metropolitana is not the best source for Navegante pass pricing and multimodal tariff validity. It is an operator/planner source, not the authoritative fare-system source for all Navegante products.
issues.suggestion: Add/replace with the official Navegante/TML fare source, e.g. navegante.pt or Transportes Metropolitanos de Lisboa tariff pages. Keep Carris Metropolitana only for bus route planning.

issues.problem: Homepage is acceptable but insufficient for a guide with fares/timetables. Sensitive changing data should cite the specific timetable/tariff pages, not only the root domain.
issues.suggestion: Add direct official links to TTSL “Horários”, “Tarifários” and “Avisos” pages, with retrieval date.

missing_topics: Explain the difference between Navegante Municipal (€30) and Navegante Metropolitano (€40).
Clarify that single ferry tickets do not generally include free metro/bus transfers.
List the correct public ferry routes by terminal: Cais do Sodré–Cacilhas/Seixal/Montijo, Terreiro do Paço–Barreiro, Belém–Porto Brandão–Trafaria.
Add current official fare-table links for Transtejo/Soflusa and Navegante/TML.
Add note that timetables change by route, weekday/weekend/holiday and strikes/service alerts should be checked on TTSL.
Add caveats for bicycles and pets: allowed subject to operator rules/capacity, not unconditional.
